ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2016 Set For Case Management Conference On May-11-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Entry Of Default And Recall Any And All Writs And Levies Issued Against Defendant, If Any
Off Calendar Feb-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ILSON W. NEW, ESQ., Tel No. 415-567-7595 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT FRANCKY CARUSO'S Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Entry Of Default And Recall Any And All Writs And Levies Issued Against Defendant, If Any, Defendant Francky Caruso's motion to vacate and set aside entry of default and recall any and all writs and levies is denied. The court credits the declaration of Thais Marlier, which shows that Mr. Caruso's motion lacks merit and is founded on material misrepresentations. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2015 Set For Trial On Mar-14-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Continued To Sep-09-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Order Vacating Default
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
